current_steps.name: Read incoming meeting request
current_steps.description: Triage inbound email asking to schedule a meeting.

current_steps.name: Identify attendees and intent
current_steps.description: Parse who needs to attend and the meeting purpose.

current_steps.name: Draft proposed time slots
current_steps.description: Compose 3 candidate slots within working hours.

current_steps.name: Confirm time with manager
current_steps.description: Get sign-off before committing external-facing slots.

current_steps.name: Send calendar invite
current_steps.description: Create the event and dispatch invites to attendees.

current_steps.name: Handle reschedule replies
current_steps.description: Negotiate conflicts and re-send updated invites.

bottlenecks.reason: Manual cross-referencing of multiple calendars is slow and error-prone.
Waiting on manager approval introduces variable delay.
Reschedule loops require back-and-forth email handling.

automation_proposal.name: Read incoming meeting request
automation_proposal.description: Triage inbound email asking to schedule a meeting.

automation_proposal.name: Identify attendees and intent
automation_proposal.description: Parse who needs to attend and the meeting purpose.

automation_proposal.name: Draft proposed time slots
automation_proposal.description: Compose 3 candidate slots within working hours.

automation_proposal.name: [Approval] Confirm time with manager
automation_proposal.description: Get sign-off before committing external-facing slots.

automation_proposal.name: Send calendar invite
automation_proposal.description: Create the event and dispatch invites to attendees.

automation_proposal.name: Handle reschedule replies
automation_proposal.description: Negotiate conflicts and re-send updated invites. (Manual handoff: not automatable — requires a human.)

assumptions: Meetings default to 30 minutes unless stated otherwise.
